semantic.role: TypeScript type definition module defining the data contracts for language support metadata within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Defines the LanguageSnapshot interface representing the full state of detected languages and their extensions.
Defines the LanguageSupport interface representing the availability status and metadata for a single language.
Defines the LanguageDelta interface representing changes between two language states.
outOfScope: Does not implement any logic for detecting or processing language data.
Does not define runtime behavior or validation logic.
invariants: All exported interfaces must start with the prefix 'I' per the interface-prefix rule.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Define stable, versioned data contracts for language support metadata to enable type-safe communication between subsystems.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file; the refactoring intent from the commit message does not apply here.

ruleViolations.reason: Interface 'LanguageSnapshot' does not start with the required prefix 'I'.
Interface 'LanguageSupport' does not start with the required prefix 'I'.
Interface 'LanguageDelta' does not start with the required prefix 'I'.

semantic.driftReason: Previous semantic contract did not report violations of the interface-prefix rule, but all three interfaces violate it.

English.role: TypeScript type definition module defining the data contracts for language support metadata within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Defines the LanguageSnapshot interface representing the full state of detected languages and their extensions.
Defines the LanguageSupport interface representing the availability status and metadata for a single language.
Defines the LanguageDelta interface representing changes between two language states.
outOfScope: Does not implement any logic for detecting or processing language data.
Does not define runtime behavior or validation logic.

Simplified Chinese.role: TypeScript 类型定义模块，为 ArchSpine 镜像系统中的语言支持元数据定义数据契约。
responsibilities: 定义 LanguageSnapshot 接口，表示检测到的语言及其扩展的完整状态。
定义 LanguageSupport 接口，表示单个语言的可用性状态和元数据。
定义 LanguageDelta 接口，表示两个语言状态之间的变化。
outOfScope: 不实现任何检测或处理语言数据的逻辑。
不定义运行时行为或验证逻辑。
